PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q663791 wdt:P2882 ?award .
  ?award wdt:P802 wd:Q43880 .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel) , "los angeles film critics association award for best actor"))
  ?award wdt:P2088 ?winner .
}
